offer: For property managers processing 10–20 maintenance requests/month, inefficient tracking causes delayed responses. We consolidate and analyze maintenance data instead of manual spreadsheets and email chains.
problem: inefficient tracking of maintenance requests leads to delayed responses and tenant dissatisfaction.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
Direct message outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try simple data entry interface and basic reporting capabilities on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and call to action
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
